title: melica rectiflora
intro: Melica rectiflora, also known as the Tufted Melic grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin and wound infections. The herbal preparations of Melica rectiflora can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
